---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible issue
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Set environment: `GROQ_MODEL=...`
2. Run: `python main.py "..."`
3. Error: `...`

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened (include full error traceback).

## Environment
- Python version: `python --version`
- OS:
- Package versions: `pip freeze | grep -E "langgraph|langchain|groq|ddgs"`

## Additional Context
Log output, screenshots, or relevant `.env` settings (redact API keys).
